name: Mother Goose Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients until they reach soft ball stage (225°F) on a candy thermometer (234°F at sea level).
2. Pour the mixture over one batch of popcorn, about 8-10 cups.
3. Mix quickly and well to coat the popcorn evenly.
4. If you overcook the sugar syrup, it will result in a more gritty sugar texture.
